General.Name: Sundart Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Sundart Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a fitting out contractor in Hong Kong, Macau, Singapore, and the People's Republic of China. The company undertakes fitting-out works for commercial buildings, hotels, residential properties, serviced apartments, factories, and other properties; and alteration, addition, and construction works. It also manufactures, sources, and distributes interior decorative materials; and leases intellectual properties. In addition, the company manufactures interior decorative timber products, such as fire-rated timber doors and wooden furniture; and offers re-engineering and pre-fabrication services, as well as holds and leases properties. Sundart Holdings Limited was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Kowloon, Hong Kong. Sundart Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Reach Glory International Limited.

6.Name: Mr. Pui Kwan  Man
6.Title: Managing Director of Kin Shing and Sundart Project Management & Consultancy Limited
